name: Sarah Jenkins
quote: Aman's Systems Architecture courses completely shifted my career. I went from being stuck in frontend design to mastering backend clusters and scaling. The course materials are of incredible quality.

name: David Chen
quote: We booked Tech Master for our annual hackathon kickoff. His opening keynote on 'Building in Public' electrified 2,000+ programmers and sparked double the project submissions compared to last year.

name: Amanda Vance
quote: Integrating Aman's open-source curricula in our university tech tracks was a game changer. The students built actual, high-fidelity portfolios that got them hired within 3 months of graduating.
